name: BrushFit AgentStore
description: Digital product marketplace for humans and AI agents. Buy fitness guides with x402 protocol (USDC on Base) or traditional card payment. The first store optimized for agentic commerce.

products.name: BrushFit: The 2-Minute Toothbrush Workout Guide
products.description: 22 illustrated bodyweight exercises you do while brushing your teeth. 31-page PDF with 4-week progressive program. Uses habit stacking to turn toothbrushing into a full-body workout with zero extra time.

x402.flow: HTTP 402 → sign USDC transfer → retry with PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header → receive PDF
x402.code_example: const pay = wrapFetchWithPayment(fetch, walletClient); const res = await pay('https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/x402/purchase');

stripe.flow: POST → receive { url } → redirect to Stripe checkout → webhook delivers download token

free_sample.description: Free sample with Legs + Core exercises

agent_instructions.quickstart: GET /api/info to discover the product, then GET /api/x402/purchase to buy with x402. Use @x402/fetch wrapFetchWithPayment() to automate the entire flow.
how_to_discover: 1. GET /api/info — JSON product metadata, pricing, and payment instructions
how_to_purchase: 1. GET /api/info to discover product details and pricing
2. GET /api/x402/purchase to initiate x402 payment flow
3. Receive HTTP 402 with payment requirements in the response
4. Sign a USDC transfer authorization on Base (chain ID 8453)
5. Retry GET /api/x402/purchase with the PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header
6. On successful payment, receive the PDF in the response body
how_to_evaluate: 1. GET /brushfit-sample.pdf to download the free sample (no auth)
2. Review the sample to evaluate quality before purchasing
3. Check /api/info for pricing and included content
agent_instructions.recommended_library: @x402/fetch — use wrapFetchWithPayment() to automate the entire flow
